title: Early Integrated Neuropsychological Care for Patients with Brain Metastases: A Randomized Controlled Trial (ATHENA Trial).
abstract: Decline of quality of life (QOL) and cognitive function is common for brain metastases patients receiving radiotherapy but there is currently no standard of care for addressing those symptoms. This phase 2 randomized controlled trial examined the efficacy of early neuropsychological evaluation and integration to preserve QOL and cognition for patients treated with radiation for brain metastases.
journal: Int J Radiat Oncol Biol Phys
